title: Oxydectes dichotoma
intro:
There is no information available on a plant called "Oxydectes dichotoma." 

However, I found a plant called "Oxydectes dichotoma" to be a synonym for the plant "Cassia dichotoma" or "Senna dichotoma." 

If you are referring to this plant, here is a paragraph about it:

Cassia dichotoma, also known as Oxydectes dichotoma, is a plant species in the legume family that is traditionally used in medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may aid in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Cassia dichotoma include flavonoids, alkaloids, and sennosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often made into herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including constipation and fever.
